goal: Kick off an overnight Isaac Lab RL training run on a single RTX 4090, cube-pick task.
thoughts: 4090 has 24GB VRAM — 2048 envs fits, 4096 is the ceiling for cube-lift, 16384 OOMs. Headless flag is non-negotiable for overnight. Name the TB log path so Raj can check from his phone. First useful checkpoint at ~45 min to 2 h depending on task.
code:
create_isaaclab_env(
    task="<ISAAC_LAB_TASK>",        # Isaac-Lift-Cube-Franka-v0
    num_envs=<NUM_ENVS>,              # 2048 safe, 4096 ceiling on 4090
    scene_path="<CLIENT_SCENE_USD>"
)

launch_training(
    task="<ISAAC_LAB_TASK>",
    num_envs=<NUM_ENVS>,
    headless=True,
    log_dir="<ABS_LOG_DIR>",          # e.g. /home/raj/runs/client_cubepick
    max_iterations=<MAX_ITERS>
)

# Monitor without babysitting:
# tensorboard --logdir <ABS_LOG_DIR> --port 6006 --bind_all
get_training_status(run_id="<RUN_ID>")

# tmux/nohup the launch so SSH disconnect does not kill it.
failure_modes: num_envs>=8192 OOMs on 4090 mid-run, not at start
Not running headless — viewport eats 30% throughput
Log dir on NFS — I/O stalls crash training after hours
Forgot tmux/nohup — laptop sleep kills the run
